feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: What is the sushi like in your country?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >Alright! >After a 12 hour shift at the coal mines and a 2 hour commute lets pla…
entry.content: >Alright! >After a 12 hour shift at the coal mines and a 2 hour commute lets play some vidya! >A few rounds of Fifa, 90 minute real time matches of course >Ah, and some short Red Dead Redemption, Skyrim and Elden Ring grind, cant wait to beat them for the fifteenth time! >Ohhhh shiiit the boys are up, let’s shoot a few rounds of Counter Strike and Battlefield >Now that’s done, gonna go out and party with my gf, then wake up at 5 for work How the actual fuck do normgroids do it?

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: That people defend this proves were cattle and just exist to be milked

We just loved these games as kids because games felt real back then

Loved the atmosphere it created though, fishing while the sun starts setting and then you could see the stars was peak Also who did you marry?

entry.title: /news/ News: Epstein worked with Israeli PM to sell private surveillance services internationally.
entry.content: https://www.dropsitenews.com/p/epst ein-barak-congo-israel Former Israeli Prime Minister Ehud Barak coordinated closely with convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein in pursuit of mineral, oil, and gas resources in Africa after Barak’s resignation as Israel’s defense minister in 2013, according to documents published by the U.S. Department of Justice and hacked emails from Barak’s Gmail account reviewed by Drop Site News. Epstein played a pivotal role in Barak’s transition from the military to the

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PUBLIC SERVICE ANNOUNCEMENT This board is being astroturfed and psyop'd by Valve…
entry.content: PUBLIC SERVICE ANNOUNCEMENT This board is being astroturfed and psyop'd by Valve's competition. Never in two decades has there been so much Valve contrarianism as there is now. But never in two decades has Valve been such a threat to Microsoft and various hardware corpos either. Valve is leading the industry by example with their pro-consumer stance, and the competition and their shareholders absolutely can not stand it. Consumer friendliness in right to repair etc is the last thing shareholders

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Web browser thread
entry.content: I wanted to discuss web browsers. So here we go I can't seem to find anything better than Librewolf, to be honest, on windows 10. Everything seems too bloated right out the box I tried yet another chromium fork (Arc) and I was flabbergasted at the fact they literally require you to make an account before being able to use it. What are we doing?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Two years ago I bought two gayming laptops at discount (black friday) prices. I …
entry.content: Two years ago I bought two gayming laptops at discount (black friday) prices. I used one of them for a short time but stopped because it was too noisy, then forgot the BIOS password I had set. I kept using the laptop they gave me at my current job. The other one is still in its box. I was going to sell the new one but kept it because of the LLM craze. Now I will have to use one of these cause I'm getting fired soon (I think). What do? Should I sell the new one and try to fix the one I had used?

entry.content: I doubt this will be seen by the right ppl, but there are groups like you all around my area, and I do not know how to get through to you. i have high functioning autism and am 135-140iq. i'm on t he brink of suicide from all the scapegoating. the court is probably about to send me back in to jail for a year for smoking meth, even though it has worked wonders for my adhd and narcolepsy over the last 7 years. i can raise my hand the entire hearing, and they will NOT ONCE let me speak. PLEASE, let

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Well, it was a massive disappointment. The plot didn't move one bit, no question…
entry.content: Well, it was a massive disappointment. The plot didn't move one bit, no question was answered, no lore bit was dropped and Noelle x Sussie is forced down our throats outside the weird route. I would say this is even worse than chapter 3 because it's supposed to be the begining of the last half of the game, but doesn't feel as such.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Random
entry.content: Hi 4chan community, let me introduce myself and tell you my story. A week ago, my friends and I messaged some prostitutes as a joke to ask for their services; nothing happened at the time. But days later, I started getting messages from numbers threatening to post on social media claiming I was a pedophile—even though I hadn't actually done anything. Honestly, I don't know what to do; my life is going to be ruined. They keep calling and texting threats, claiming I solicited services from minors—

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: OC (Draw)Thread: DONUT STEEL Edition
entry.content: Hot Summer Edition >RP Have your OCs interact! Coffeeshop AU, multiversal merge, whatever floats your boat >general Follow /trash/ and global rules Be cool to drawfriends Art critiques only if asked No one's owed a delivery >requesters Reply to the Request Anchor Post your OC only: one post, reference image included (pic > description) Must be your own OC (franchise-based fine, as long as it's actually yours) Repost your request each thread; don't just link the old one Not everything gets filled

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: This movie is kinda low budget but good.
entry.content: /pol/ the movie. dude literally kills migrants and is white supremacist. which begs the question, it is not hard to make a movie that looks decent these days because cameras have such good quality and you can ever-so-subtly insert <1 second long really good looking vfx using AI and nobody can tell because you only used AI to replace just a few frames here and there. Do you think its possible for me to find real humans that dont suck ass at acting and make low budget movies where we kill niggers

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Fractal modulation
entry.content: this messages are describing fractal electromagnetic modulation If you managed to mathematically transmit a perfectly fractal-modulated wave, the signal would be virtually imperceptible and un-jammable to standard radio receivers. A standard receiver looking for a smooth sine wave or a clean frequency would see your signal as random, background atmospheric noise. Only a receiver programmed with the exact same recursive fractal algorithm could track the chaotic, infinite velocity shifts of the wa

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8399 Workplace Indecency Edition Previous Thread: >>8365…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8399 Workplace Indecency Edition Previous Thread: >>83650007 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise thei
